case_title: CHAVEZ EDILBERTO VS COLLEGE PARK APARTMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.00 FILED BY CHAVEZ EDILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEGE PARK APARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ EDILBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLEGE PARK APARTMENT $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $533.00, LANDLORD'S ATTEMPT TO WITHHOLD RENT (THE 6 MONTH) PROVISION IN LEASE CONTRACT) IS ILLEGAL AS IT IS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
